text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm Kitasan Black! Let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I want to be someone who brings excitement to
everyone! Just like my father!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best to barrel ahead at full
speed, so train me up good and encourage me to
the max!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
